input: PR: refactored authentication, no tests for edge cases
with_kdna: **Findings:** Missing edge case tests for invalid token, expired session. Verified: extraction is clean, callers updated correctly. **Preference:** Consider renaming method.

input: PR: added new feature with tests covering happy path only
without_kdna: Looks good. Nice work on the tests. Merge when ready.
with_kdna: **Verified:** Behavior matches description, happy path tests pass. **Not checked:** Edge cases — null input, empty state, timeout. **Recommendation:** Add edge case tests before merge. Findings cite specific failure modes.
